title: Settings sheet must populate six required cells
description: The settings sheet must populate six cells: form_title (human-readable name), form_id (starts with F_), version (integer, start at 1), style ('theme-grid'), crossform_references (blank, comma-separated event OIDs, or 'current_event'), and namespaces (exactly: oc="http://openclinica.org/xforms" , OpenClinica="http://openclinica.com/odm").
rationale: OC4 reads the settings sheet to construct form metadata and namespace bindings. Missing or malformed values cause form-load failures that are often surfaced as opaque parse errors rather than 'settings is incomplete' diagnostics. The namespaces string is a literal — exact whitespace, quotes, and separator matter.

flag.message: Form ${form.form_id} settings sheet must populate: form_title, form_id (F_-prefixed), version (integer ≥1), style ('theme-grid'), crossform_references (blank/comma-separated OIDs/'current_event'), and namespaces (exact literal). Missing or malformed values cause silent OC rejection.

history.note: Imported from prompts.py RULE OC-3 during Phase B.1a. ensure directive sets defaults for style/version/namespaces; require directive asserts form_title presence; flag directive carries the comprehensive checklist for downstream review. form_id F_-prefix validation deferred to Phase B/C DSL extension.
